attributes.action: Change the social media ban for under 13s instead of 16s
attributes.additional_details: It will help childrens mental health, it will help them study with educational videos, when we have homework at school we would be able to watch YouTube videos to help us.
attributes.background: You are thinking of banning social media for under 16s, I think you should change it to under 13s. I have had many people across social media complaining about this aswell, some children use social media to escape the reality, some use it to study/revise

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign this petition, which calls for similar action: 

Government ban on social media to be for under 13s only
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/757849
